common.comingSoon: Coming soon — available in the next phase.

hero.title: Enterprise RAG with document-level access control
hero.subtitle: BoostRAG lets your organization chat with internal knowledge, with tight level+group permissions, multi-provider LLMs, and transparent debugging of which chunks shaped each answer.

features.title: Everything you need for enterprise RAG
features.subtitle: One unified codebase — no need to stitch multiple services together.

adminPortal.title: Admin portal
adminPortal.desc: Upload, assign permissions by level + group, manage users and LLM providers.

multiLLM.title: Multi-provider LLM
multiLLM.desc: OpenAI, Google Gemini, Ollama, Anthropic, Azure — swap via LiteLLM.

acl.title: Payload-level ACL
acl.desc: Qdrant vector store filters by level + groups at query time — no chunk leakage.

functionCalling.title: Function calling
functionCalling.desc: Configure tools in the UI, call external APIs safely with SSRF protection.

debug.title: Transparent debug
debug.desc: See which chunks generated the answer, plus latency for every step.

i18n.title: Multilingual
i18n.desc: UI in Vietnamese + English, multilingual reranker baked in.

cta.title: Ready to upgrade your internal RAG?
cta.subtitle: Sign up to try — your organization's admin will approve before granting document access.

login.title: Log in
login.subtitle: Enter your email and password to access the system.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Your account will be pending until an admin approves it.
register.success: Account created. Please wait for admin approval.
register.passwordHint: Minimum 10 characters, must contain letters and digits.

errors.accountLocked: Account is temporarily locked. Please try again later.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

password.minLength: Password must be at least 10 characters.
password.needLetter: Password must contain at least 1 letter.
password.needDigit: Password must contain at least 1 digit.
